name: Synup Social vs. Sprinklr
hero_summary: Social media shouldn’t be painful, overwhelming, or complex. Synup Social provides the engagement-driving features and monitoring capabilities of Sprinklr with a lower price tag and an intuitive user experience. Get ready to trounce the competition!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Synup Social is built to help you succeed. From crossing wires with your team to wasting marketing dollars, Sprinklr gives your team more trouble than it’s worth! With an intuitive interface and smart features, Synup Social is the perfect solution for brands and agencies alike. With the right tool, watch your team become more motivated, productive, and inspired. Here’s why Synup Social is the right tool for you:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup Social is the platform for growth. Sprinklr doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation and strategy, but we’ll help you craft a winning strategy. Easily share analytics via downloadable reports or shareable, white-labeled links - so you can share your growth with ease.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Unlike Sprinklr, post creation is our specialty. While Sprinklr lacks content creation assistance, Synup Social helps you build your calendar - whether you’re starting from scratch or have a few ideas in mind. From reviving your best posts to following what’s hot or copying the competition, you won’t run out of inspiration!
section_2_step_3_summary: Easily collaborate with your team and your clients at no extra cost. It starts with an approval workflow: your team can create drafts, edit others’ work, and get posts approved. Then, you can share white-labeled analytics and content calendars with clients - no login required!
section_2_slider_4_summary: Ready to expand? Synup Social grows with your business, whether you’re an agency adding clients or you’re catering to local audiences with location-specific accounts. Sprinklr lacks support for multi-account management, impeding your growth. Synup Social makes it simple to manage all your accounts from one platform!
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Sprinklr?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Synup Social saves you time and money by inspiring your team and building better workflows. From post-creation and trend research to analytics, Synup Social is the perfect choice for agencies and brands alike. To win clients and drive engagement, you need a data-driven, content-forward platform. With advanced features like a collaborative approval workflow and shareable, white-labeled analytics and post calendars, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed. Let’s see how it stacks up against Sprinklr:
